---
title: "eitpaper"
author: "Helena Gartmeier"
format: html
---

# Introduction

I would like to talk about **mobility** with a focus on *public transport* 

## Motivation

The theorem of Pythagoras: 

$$a^2 + b^2 = c^2$$


### Some more text

```{r}
a <- 40 + 2
a

```




## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.
